decisions.decision: Prioritize 5 high-value untested components: ResolveMarketPanel (218 lines, mutation+confirmation), ConditionalEditor (288 lines, dynamic form), VariableRow (230 lines, inline editing+assumptions), AssumptionContext (67 lines, shared state), session/context (64 lines, localStorage session). Deprioritize simple UI wrappers and graph visualization components.
alternatives_rejected: Test all 20 untested files (too large for one task)
Prioritize graph components (hard to test meaningfully in jsdom)
Prioritize simple UI components (low test value per effort)

decisions.decision: Mock at the API client level using vi.mock('@/lib/api/client'), letting React Query hooks run naturally with the test QueryClient. Use vi.importActual for classes like BayesApiError when needed.
alternatives_rejected: Mock at the hook level (more brittle, doesn't test hook logic)
Use MSW/network-level mocking (heavier setup, not established in codebase)

decisions.decision: Test AssumptionContext in isolation via renderHook for its state management operations (add/remove/clear/has/get/contextPayload). VariableRow tests cover integration separately.
alternatives_rejected: Test only through consumer components (misses dedup and contextPayload logic)
Skip isolation tests entirely (too much risk for shared state provider)

decisions.decision: Skip direct testing of hooks.ts (695 lines, 25 hooks). Component-level tests exercise hooks through user interactions. WebSocket/backoff logic is a separate task.
alternatives_rejected: Test all 25 hooks with renderHook (largely duplicates component tests)
Extract and unit-test WebSocket logic (valuable but out of scope)

decisions.decision: Place all new test files in src/__tests__/ following {ComponentName}.test.tsx convention. Use existing renderWithProviders helper. Wrap with AssumptionProvider inline where needed rather than modifying TestProviders.
alternatives_rejected: Modify TestProviders to include AssumptionProvider globally (not all tests need it)
Co-locate tests next to source files (breaks existing convention)

steps.task: Write AssumptionContext.test.tsx: renderHook tests for addAssumption (with dedup), removeAssumption, clearAll, hasAssumption, getAssumption, and contextPayload mapping. Test that useAssumptions throws without provider.
Write SessionContext.test.tsx: renderHook tests for useSession providing accountId/agentId, localStorage persistence across re-renders, and SessionProvider default values.

Write ResolveMarketPanel.test.tsx: test 3 render states (resolved shows resolution, active/closed shows form, other statuses return null), two-step confirmation flow (Resolve button → confirm dialog → mutation fires), and useResolveMarket mutation with API client mock.

Write ConditionalEditor.test.tsx: test form rendering with market data, adding/removing dynamic context condition rows (ContextRow subcomponent with useMarket), useProbabilityEdit mutation on submit, and validation of probability inputs.

Write VariableRow.test.tsx: test inline probability display, assumption toggle (add/remove via AssumptionProvider wrapper), inline editing mode with useProbabilityEdit mutation, and session-dependent UI (logged-in vs anonymous).

decomposition_assessment.decision_reason: estimated_total_lines (640) exceeds 500-line threshold. All 5 steps are independent (each tests a different component with its own file). Two natural parallelizable groups exist: context/state provider tests (steps 1-2, ~160 lines) and component tests (steps 3-5, ~480 lines). Splitting into children allows parallel implementation.

children.title: Test context/state providers (AssumptionContext + SessionContext)
children.description: Implement steps 1-2: Write AssumptionContext.test.tsx (~90 lines) with renderHook tests for all state operations (add/remove/clear/has/get/contextPayload, dedup, throw without provider). Write SessionContext.test.tsx (~70 lines) with renderHook tests for localStorage persistence and default values. Both use existing test infrastructure, no shared helper changes needed.

children.title: Test stateful components (ResolveMarketPanel, ConditionalEditor, VariableRow)
children.description: Implement steps 3-5: Write ResolveMarketPanel.test.tsx (~150 lines) testing 3 render states and two-step confirmation mutation flow. Write ConditionalEditor.test.tsx (~180 lines) testing dynamic context form with ContextRow subcomponent and probability mutation. Write VariableRow.test.tsx (~150 lines) testing inline editing, assumption toggling with AssumptionProvider wrapper, and session-dependent UI. All mock API client at module level following established patterns.
